build.prompt:
{file:./CLAUDE.md}

## OpenCode MCP Tool Names

`CLAUDE.md` may describe the qdrant semantic search workflow using tool names from a different MCP environment. In this OpenCode config, the enabled MCP server is `qdrant`, so use these exact OpenCode tool names instead:
- `qdrant_semantic_search` — semantic/conceptual search. Always pass `catalog: "grackle"`.
- `qdrant_view_chunks` — retrieve full source content by file ID.

Treat any `mcp__qdrant-search__*` names mentioned in `CLAUDE.md` as equivalent guidance for another environment only, and do not call them here.
